steps.title: Limit the group to HR
steps.content: The condition says the person works in Human Resources. That department has $4$ bachelor's degrees and $2$ master's degrees, for $6$ people total.

steps.title: Find the conditional probability
steps.content:
Of the $6$ Human Resources employees, $2$ have a master's degree.
$$\frac{2}{6}=\frac{1}{3}$$
The answer is B.
